element.ToolTip: Source port number. Impairment is applied to only those packets which have this source port number.
element.Name: ctlSourcePort

element.ToolTip: Destination port number. Impairment is applied to only those packets which have this destination port number.
element.Name: ctlDestinationPort

element.ToolTip: Protocol name. Impairment is applied to only those packets which use this protocol.
element.Name: ctlProtocol

element.ToolTip: Type of service bits. Impairment is applied to only those packets which belong to this TOS.
element.Name: ctlTypeOfService

element.ToolTip: IP address or subnet. Impairment is applied to only those packets destined to this address/subnet
element.Name: ctlDestinationIp

element.ToolTip: Jitter specifies the amount of variation in delay.
element.Name: ctlJitter

element.ToolTip: Delay to be added to each packet.
element.Name: ctlDelay

element.ToolTip: Number of packets to leave unaffected between drop operations.
element.Name: ctlDropSequenceSkip

element.ToolTip: Number of subsequent packets to drop.
element.Name: ctlDropSequenceLength

element.ToolTip: Randomize seed for impairments that use percent values.
element.Name: CheckEdit3

element.ToolTip: Bandwith unit.
element.Name: DevExLookUpEdit1

element.ToolTip: Specifies the maximum allowable rate per interface.
element.Name: DevExSpinEdit1

element.ToolTip: Add bandwidth limitation.
element.Name: CheckEdit1

element.ToolTip: Maximum time to keep packets delayed.
element.Name: ctlReorderPITimeout

element.ToolTip: Number of packets to skip until delayed packets to be transmited.
element.Name: ctlReorderPIInterval

element.ToolTip: Number of subsequent packets to re-order.
element.Name: ctlReorderPILength

element.ToolTip: Number of packets to leave unaffected between re-order operations.
element.Name: ctlReorderPISkip

element.ToolTip: Percentage of packets to be duplicated.
element.Name: ctlDuplicate

element.ToolTip: Percentage of packets to be dropped.
element.Name: ctlDrop

element.ToolTip: Delay to be added to each packet selected to be re-ordered.
element.Name: ctlReorder

element.ToolTip: Number of subsequent packets to re-order.
element.Name: ctlReorderLength

element.ToolTip: Specifies the number of packets to pass through before reordering a packet.
element.Name: ctlGap

element.ToControlCSSource: SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("ImpairmentPlugin.destinationPort") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Max : 999999999;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("ImpairmentPlugin.destinationPort") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Min : 0;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("ImpairmentPlugin.sourcePort") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Max : 999999999;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("ImpairmentPlugin.destinationPort") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Min : 0;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("ImpairmentPlugin.delay") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Max : 999999999;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("ImpairmentPlugin.delay") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Min : 0;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("ImpairmentPlugin.jitter") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Max : 999999999;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("ImpairmentPlugin.jitter") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Min : 0;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("ImpairmentPlugin.gap") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Max : 999999999;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("ImpairmentPlugin.gap") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Min : 0;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("ImpairmentPlugin.reorderLength") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Max : 999999999;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("ImpairmentPlugin.reorderLength") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Min : 0;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("ImpairmentPlugin.reorder") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Max : 999999999;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("ImpairmentPlugin.reorder") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Min : 0;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("ImpairmentPlugin.reorderPISkip") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Max : 999999999;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("ImpairmentPlugin.reorderPISkip") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Min : 0;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("ImpairmentPlugin.reorderPILength") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Max : 999999999;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("ImpairmentPlugin.reorderPILength") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Min : 0;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("ImpairmentPlugin.reorderPIInterval") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Max : 999999999;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("ImpairmentPlugin.reorderPIInterval") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Min : 0;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("ImpairmentPlugin.reorderPITimeout") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Max : 999999999;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("ImpairmentPlugin.reorderPITimeout") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Min : 0;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("ImpairmentPlugin.bandwidth") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Max : 999999999;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("ImpairmentPlugin.bandwidth") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Min : 0;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("ImpairmentPlugin.drop") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Max : 999999999;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("ImpairmentPlugin.drop") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Min : 0;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("ImpairmentPlugin.dropSequenceLength") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Max : 999999999;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("ImpairmentPlugin.dropSequenceLength") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Min : 0;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("ImpairmentPlugin.dropSequenceSkip") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Max : 999999999;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("ImpairmentPlugin.dropSequenceSkip") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Min : 0;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("ImpairmentPlugin.duplicate") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Max : 999999999;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("ImpairmentPlugin.duplicate") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Min : 0;
